corrective_actions.description: Public reports and dashboards must show partial hit / full hit separately: result direction is not the same as exact-score success.
Add scoreline_distribution with at least three candidate scores, probabilities and reasons.
Calculate clean-sheet probability for both teams and feed it into score selection.
Convert referee strictness, red-card risk, penalty risk and set-piece threat into total-goals and team-goals adjustments.
Add a canonical prediction registry per match that points to the locked accountable report and labels older parallel reports as superseded or non-canonical.
Model halftime-level, leading and trailing states separately, including substitution and chase-game effects.
Emit result_confidence, score_confidence and total_goals_confidence instead of one shared confidence label.
Do not allow mock odds or low-quality evidence to upgrade dual-track alignment or prediction confidence.

daily_stats.top_error: The model compressed the match into a low-event 1-0 and missed the second-half comeback and transition script.
The model gave South Africa a baseline consolation goal instead of explicitly pricing a Mexico clean-sheet scenario.
